# Graph Report - hermes-agent  (2026-05-20)

## Corpus Check
- 3288 files · ~5,843,484 words
- Verdict: corpus is large enough that graph structure adds value.

## Summary
- 104602 nodes · 166063 edges · 6568 communities (4279 shown, 2289 thin omitted)
- Extraction: 80% EXTRACTED · 20% INFERRED · 0% AMBIGUOUS · INFERRED: 32990 edges (avg confidence: 0.71)
- Token cost: 0 input · 0 output

## Graph Freshness
- Built from commit: `dd3fc0a7`
- Run `git rev-parse HEAD` and compare to check if the graph is stale.
- Run `graphify update .` after code changes (no API cost).
